mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.STOCK_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID WHERE S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY > I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK * 1.2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.STOCK_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID WHERE S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY > I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK AND S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY <= I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK * 1.2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.STOCK_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID WHERE S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY <= I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK

SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.STOCK_ITEM AS stockItem, S.STOCK_PREV_QTY AS stockPrevQty, S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY AS stockAvailQty, S.STOCK_RESERVE_QTY AS stockReserveQty,
I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, I.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, I.ITEM_UNIT AS itemUnit, I.ITEM_SPEC AS itemSpec, I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK AS itemSafetyStock,
CASE WHEN S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY <= I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK THEN '부족' WHEN S.STOCK_AVAIL_QTY <= I.ITEM_SAFETY_STOCK * 1.2 THEN '위험' ELSE '안전' END AS stockStatus
FROM STOCK S JOIN ITEM I ON S.STOCK_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID WHERE S.STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
